texto: The thing I got to thinking about,' he said, 'is--what are the conditions that lead to larger portions of society being generous, humble, and selfless? While we have the conditions for economic opportunity here--and that is a blessing--do we have the conditions to learn how to self-regulate our own passions for the good of the whole?
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Warren St. John que provoca temas ligados a reflexao. Ao questionar “The thing I got to thinking about,' he said, 'is--what are the conditions that lead to larger por…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, generous, goodness, com foco em goodness e humble.
